debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G H C : Graph α β
S X Y : Set α
M M' : Set β
u v x y z : α
e f : β
P P' : WList α β
hM✝ hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
inst✝ : G.EdgeFinite
⊢ EdgeFinite (@Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM')

failed_attempts:
⟨Graph.EdgeFinite.finite.subset (fun _ he ↦
    union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset (symmDiff_subset_union M M' (by simpa [restrict₂] using he)))⟩

refine ⟨finite_edge.subset ?_⟩
  intro e h
  simp [restrict₂] at h
  exact union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset (symmDiff_subset_union _ _ h.1)
⟨EdgeFinite.finite.subset (fun _ he ↦ union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset (symmDiff_subset_union M M' he.1))⟩

refine ⟨EdgeFinite.finite.subset (fun e he ↦ ?_)⟩
  simp [restrict₂, loopRemove] at he
  exact (symmDiff_subset_union M M' |>.trans (union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset)) he.1

constructor
  exact (E_finite G).subset (fun e he ↦ (symmDiff_subset_union.trans (union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset)) he.1)
⟨EdgeFinite.finite.subset fun _ he ↦ symmDiff_subset_union.trans (union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset) he.1⟩

simp [restrict₂] at he
    exact union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset (symmDiff_subset_union M M' he.1))⟩

intro e he
    simp [restrict₂, loopRemove, restrict] at he
    exact (symmDiff_subset_union M M' |>.trans (union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset)) he.1)⟩

⟨((finite_edge.subset hM.subset).union (finite_edge.subset hM'.subset)).subset
    (fun _ h ↦ symmDiff_subset_union M M' h.1)⟩
⟨G.edge_finite.subset (fun _ he ↦ union_subset hM.subset hM'.subset (symmDiff_subset_union M M' he.1))⟩
